description_long: This object is a microprocessor, specifically an AMD Ryzen 5 3600 CPU, commonly used in desktop computers. The top surface is a metallic heat spreader with engraved branding, model information, and a QR code, all rendered in black text. The heat spreader is slightly raised above a green printed circuit board (PCB) substrate, which is visible along the edges. The bottom side is populated with a dense array of fine metallic pins, designed for insertion into a compatible CPU socket on a motherboard. The overall form is a flat, square chip with a robust, industrial appearance, and the materials suggest a combination of metal, ceramic, and plastic. This type of component is typically found in urban environments within computers in offices, homes, or tech repair shops.
description: A square AMD Ryzen 5 3600 CPU with a metallic top, green PCB edges, and a dense array of pins underneath. Branding and technical details are engraved on the top surface.
description_view_0: The AMD Ryzen 5 3600 CPU is shown with its metallic top and branding clearly visible, with the green PCB and pin grid slightly visible at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the CPU, with the metallic top and green PCB edge more prominent, and the pin grid just visible below.
description_view_2: The CPU is seen from the opposite side, with the branding mirrored and the green PCB edge and pin grid visible along the bottom.
description_view_3: Another side view, showing the metallic top, green PCB edge, and a hint of the pin grid, with the QR code and branding partially visible.
